candidates.why: This is only a small investment-related insurance income component, not full top-line revenue.
Explicit total top-line revenue line combining earned premiums and other revenue; best match for REVT.
Non-core revenue component below total revenue, not the top-line sales/revenue measure.
Balance sheet asset/accrual item, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit top-line revenue row.

No COGS candidate was provided. For an insurer, the closest direct cost / cost of services line is claims incurred net of reinsurance. Chosen outside candidate list from the income statement preview, so manual review is required.

candidates.why: Best available overhead bucket from candidates; populated across years and appears to represent operating overhead/insurance expense structure.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Using the explicit operating overhead bucket from the income statement. Did not use the SG&A balancing row because balancing rows are excluded by rule. No separate R&D line is present.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the income statement.

candidates.row_label: Dividends on shares and participating interests
candidates.why: Investment income component, not interest expense.
Balance sheet investment asset, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest income, bonds and other interest-bearing securities
candidates.why: Interest income, opposite of interest expense.
Balance sheet asset, not interest expense.
Balance sheet accrued income item, not interest expense.

variables.notes: No interest expense or finance cost line is visible in the provided income statement. Available candidates are income or balance-sheet asset items, so XINT is set to empty.

candidates.why: Explicit shareholders' equity line; preferred over generic total equity because it excludes any separate minority interest if present.
Generic total equity line; acceptable fallback if no shareholders' equity line existed.
Balance sheet total, not book equity.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the more specific shareholders' equity line first, with Total Equity as fallback if labels vary by year.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line appears on the balance sheet.
